examples: The good news is that prices are still temptingly low.
Joining the European Union has produced temptingly large puddles of public money to steal.
A temptingly sweet of ice cream praline cake at Coffee X-press Sheraton Xian Hotel, offers an endless array of sweet treats, never feel guilty to indulge you to these savor dessert.
If a country has a long land border, like the United States, or coasts temptingly near poorer countries, like Italy, its best hope is internal enforcement.
